before: async function processOrder(req: OrderRequest | null): Promise<string> { if (!req) throw new Error('null request'); if (req.items.length === 0) throw new Error('empty order'); const customer = await db.customers.findById(req.customerId); if (!customer) throw new Error('customer not found'); const total = req.items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.price * i.qty, 0); const order = new Order({ customer, total }); await db.orders.save(order); await mailer.send(order); return order.id; }
why_safe: Validation and total calculation extracted into helpers; async chain, error types, and execution order preserved.
